Title: Restructure provider group navigator
Description: Replace the left data table with a searchable compact group navigator and move manual group ordering out of the default row actions
Acceptance: Groups can be searched by display name or stable ID; Auto is visually distinct; default rows show identity and routing status without usage ratio or persistent reorder arrows
Test_Method: Browser smoke at 375px 768px and 1440px; bun run typecheck
Notes: Preserve independent scrolling and existing selected-group behavior

Title: Simplify provider membership editor
Description: Make Provider membership the primary detail section and replace search plus native select plus Add with one searchable Combobox
Acceptance: Selecting a Provider from one control adds it to the draft; selected Providers disappear from results; Group settings are visually secondary
Test_Method: Browser smoke for search add remove and empty state; bun run typecheck
Notes: Review correction verified: membership details come from the unpaginated group endpoint and server-backed Provider search preserved all 105 existing members while adding a 106th

Title: Add unified draft and unsaved guards
Description: Track metadata and membership changes in one draft model with dirty state Discard and navigation protection
Acceptance: Switching groups entering Auto or leaving the page cannot silently discard changes; unchanged state does not enable Save or Discard
Test_Method: Component-level state tests where existing conventions support them plus browser smoke for Save and Discard branches
Notes: Review correction verified: New provider group now enters the same unsaved-changes guard and confirmed discard remounts the detail draft before opening the dialog

Title: Add transactional group configuration endpoint
Description: Add a Controller Service Model transaction that updates group metadata and Provider members as one operation and refreshes routing only after success
Acceptance: Validation or database failure leaves metadata members abilities and cache in the previous consistent state; success preserves SQLite MySQL and PostgreSQL compatibility
Test_Method: Target Go tests for success validation failure database rollback status change member replacement and routing rebuild
Notes: Review correction verified: metadata members ability rebuild and channel-group synchronization now share one GORM transaction; injected ability failure rolls every table back

Title: Connect single save and risk confirmations
Description: Connect the unified frontend draft to the transactional endpoint and expose one Save changes action with Discard
Acceptance: Metadata and members save atomically; disabling routing clearing all Providers and deleting a group show accurate impact confirmation; partial success is impossible
Test_Method: Target API integration tests plus browser smoke for success error and confirmation paths
Notes: Deletion may remain a separate endpoint but must use the same unsaved-state guard

Title: Simplify priority and accessible reordering
Description: Use list order as the default fallback-order model and move priority and weight into an Advanced routing tiers section
Acceptance: Default UI has no numeric priority field; route order matches top-to-bottom display; equal-priority and weight semantics remain available; keyboard and touch users can reorder
Test_Method: Target routing-order Go tests plus desktop keyboard and mobile browser smoke
Notes: Review correction verified: custom 10/10/5 tiers disable list reordering; add inherits priority 5 and remove preserves the remaining 10/5/5 tiers

Title: Inline and reuse Auto rules editor
Description: Extract the Auto rule editor for reuse inside the selected Auto group while keeping the direct Auto route available
Acceptance: Selecting Auto immediately exposes the four route-type candidate lists; ordinary member controls and destructive ordinary-group actions are not shown; direct route and inline editor save identical data
Test_Method: Target Auto API tests plus browser smoke for add remove reorder save and direct-route reuse
Notes: Confirm from model initialization whether Auto is a protected system entity before disabling delete server-side

Title: Finish scale i18n and end-to-end verification
Description: Add server-backed Provider search if required by data volume; synchronize six locales and complete responsive accessibility build and routing verification
Acceptance: Large Provider sets remain searchable without loading 10000 rows by default; en zh fr ja ru vi are complete; typecheck lint format i18n build target Go tests and UI smoke all pass
Test_Method: bun run typecheck; bun run lint; bun run format:check; bun run i18n:sync; bun run build; target go test commands; browser smoke at 375px 768px and 1440px
Dependencies: PG1 PG2 PG3 PG4 PG5 PG6 PG7
Notes: Server-backed search and 105-to-106 member smoke passed; six new locale entries synchronized; typecheck targeted lint targeted format build target Go tests and 375px/1440px browser smoke passed.
